response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including real-time systems and microservices, which partially aligns with the CTO role's technical requirements. However, he lacks direct experience in agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, and regulated environments. His leadership roles are limited to engineering teams, not full executive-level responsibilities, and his agentic AI work appears to be in early stages.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and backend engineering expertise with real-time systems experience
Proven track record in scaling engineering organizations and improving development processes
Demonstrated technical depth in multiple languages, frameworks, and architectures
concerns: No direct experience with agentic AI systems in production or multi-agent frameworks
Limited exposure to fintech infrastructure, compliance, or regulated environments
Lacks executive-level leadership experience at the CTO level in a venture-backed scale-up
